---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## Command you ran

```bash
azc ...
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full terminal output if possible.

## Error code

If azc printed an error code (e.g. `AZC_AUTH_FAILED`, `AZC_PRICE_FETCH_FAILED`), paste it here.

## Environment

- azc version: (`azc --version`)
- Node.js version: (`node --version`)
- OS:
- Azure CLI version: (`az --version`, if relevant)
